ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1602. He was the dedicatee of the poem La metamorfosi del Brenta et del Bacchiglione (Ferrara, 1603), by his fellow Ricovrato Toldo Costantini.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
